changelog:
- external share overhaul (show selected to share media/link in top view, tap to edit)
- "Show All" button in live locations
- disable in-app browser by default
- more menus for main tabs (folders, contacts, calls)
- support long hold on new menus
- Ai button in caption media viewer
- "Add to Folder" button in selected chats in search results
- scroll to replying quote in reply settings of long message
- scrolling through reposted stories in reactions list
- limit for todo items fix (bugs.telegram.org/c/61551)
